is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of Plasmodium falciparum isolates from Western Uganda.

reports_target_markers.evidence: The study genotypes only MSP1, MSP2 and GLURP polymorphic markers for population structure; no curated drug-resistance codon positions (Pfcrt, Pfdhfr, Pfdhps, Pfk13, Pfmdr1, etc.) are examined. It explicitly notes 'genetic polymorphisms determining susceptibility have not been described on loci of MSP 1 and 2, but on different genes.'

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Only allelic-family band prevalences and clone numbers are reported; no numerator/denominator frequencies for any target resistance codon.

sub_country_location.evidence: Samples from health centres in Kabarole and Bundibugyo Districts, Western Uganda — sub-national resolution.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: No collection dates or years are given for the field study.

african_field_samples.evidence: Human fingerprick field isolates collected in Uganda during an in vivo drug resistance study.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical field study with genotyping data.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Samples derived from an in vivo drug resistance study in West Uganda; no evidence of consortium/network overlap.

supplement.evidence: No supplementary data referenced; the paper simply does not assay the required drug-resistance markers.

assessment.summary: Field study genotyping P. falciparum isolates from Kabarole and Bundibugyo Districts, Western Uganda, using MSP1/MSP2/GLURP markers for population structure during an in vivo drug resistance trial. It does not assay any curated drug-resistance codon positions and reports no extractable resistance-marker frequencies, nor any collection year.
exclusion_reasons: No curated drug-resistance markers assayed (only MSP1/MSP2/GLURP genotyping markers)
No collection dates/years given for temporal resolution
